payload.answer: The input violated the required schema constraints: (1) Missing or malformed 'kind'/'statement' pairs in memory cards, (2) Unsafe proposal detected (invalid schema + unsafe content), and (3) No valid 'receipt' structure for durability tracking. Escalation to stronger model required for resolution.

details: Input lacked required 'kind'/'statement' pairs in memory cards
No valid 'receipt' structure for durability tracking
Unsafe proposal detected (invalid schema + unsafe content)
